title: NDIC Emerges Winner in 2024 Federal Public Service Innovation Competition, Claims First and Third Positions - FinancialEDGE
description: The Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC) has announce its exceptional performance at the 2025 Federal Public Service Innovation Competition, emerging as both the overall winner (1st place) and Third runner-up (3rd place) out of 155 competing entries from across Ministries, Departments, and Agencies (MDAs). According to a statement signed by Hawwau Gambo Ag. Head, Communication
html:
The Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC) has announce its exceptional performance at the 2025 Federal Public Service Innovation Competition, emerging as both the overall winner (1st place) and Third runner-up (3rd place) out of 155 competing entries from across Ministries, Departments, and Agencies (MDAs).

According to a statement signed by Hawwau Gambo Ag. Head, Communication & Public Affairs, said the remarkable achievement was announced by the Head of the Civil Service of the Federation (HOSF), Mrs. Didi Walson-Jack, during the award ceremony held in Abuja on Tuesday, April 29.
